issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.
The skill lacks step-by-step actionable procedures for the agent.
The skill is vendor-locked to Cursor and does not work with other AI agents.

scenarios.name: create-api-rules-file
scenarios.rationale: Response B better meets the rubric by providing frontmatter and a .mdc file, though it lacks explicit rule definitions and has a different filename; Response A fails to provide frontmatter or the required .mdc file.

scenarios.name: composer-refactor-function
scenarios.rationale: Response A references the required @file and @codebase directives but lacks a full Composer prompt, while Response B omits those directives entirely.
